text.title: Mobile Responsive Procedure
text.summary: 8-step procedure to apply Mobile Responsive end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: container-query-policy
step.action: Decide where component queries apply; pin browser support floor.

step.name: touch-targets
step.action: Add lint rule (stylelint or test) asserting interactive elements meet 44px min.

step.name: viewport-meta
step.action: Add viewport meta to all entry templates; assert in e2e.

step.name: safe-area
step.action: Add safe-area envs to layouts touching edges.

step.name: hover-audit
step.action: Audit hover-only flows; add tap equivalents.
